title: SmpUtil
description: The most important plugin you would need for an smp!
body:
# **SMPUtils – Advanced SMP Control Plugin**

SMPUtils is a powerful plugin designed for secure control over your minecraft server, supporting Paper 1.21.x, featuring an integrated Admin Panel with 25+ configurable features designed to keep your SMP balanced, competitive, and fully controlled.


**Admin Panel**

Manage core gameplay systems from one central control system. All features can be toggled on and off at any time so it is your choice fo what fits your smp best.

**Examples include:**
	
    •   End and nether access control
	•   Ender Pearl & Mace cooldowns / ban
	•   Bed bombing and Crystal pvp prevention
    •   Invisibility changes (hides name of killer in death message if they have invisibility)
    •   Instant villager restock
    •   Level two potions ban and debuff potions ban (debuffs selected are configurable in config.yml)
    •   Spectator on death for doomsday events
    •   Minimap ban
    •   String duper revival

**AND MUCH MORE**

All features are configurable and designed for real SMP environments. 
The full list can be found in my discord server:
[discord.gg/](https://discord.gg/nJVAcYwPF7)

![SmpSettings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c56d2c3e78c843fc57cdea968953863c6f9b81c4.png)

**Kit System**

Includes a fully functional kit system with GUI-based management, configurable kits, optional join kits, and cooldown support — ideal for starter kits, ranks, easier progression or for events.


**Rituals and Ritual Crafting**

Item rituals broadcast location of that item to all players during its ritual and items can be made to cause rituals upon crafts with the ritualcrafts command 

![Rituals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c799a03d6326608d184b6a0534eec3a81be11f4.png)

**EnchantLimits & ItemLimits**

Enchant and item limits can be set to enforce server rules to balance pvp and other aspects globally, with automatic enforcement.



**SMP Start & Grace Period**

Launch your server properly with a configurable global grace period for all players and early-game PvP protection allowing forgiving starts to your Smp

**Commands**
- **/smpsettings** (main gui)

- **/itemlimit** <limit number> (sets the limit for that item in your hand)
             list (shows all limits)
             remove (removes limit for item in your hand)

- **/enchantlimit** debug (shows debug info)
                itembypass (bypasses enchantlimits for that specific item)
                set <number> (sets the max enchant level for the enchantment of the book you are holding
                list (shows all enchant limits)
                remove (removes the limit for the enchant in your hand)

- **/ritual** <ritual time (s)> (starts a ritual for the item in your hand)
- **/ritualcrafts** <ritual time (s)> (makes it so every time that item is crafted, it starts a ritual)

- **/smpstart** <border size (s)> <border travel time (s)> <length of grace period (s)> (moves border visually and sets a grace period)

- **/smpkits** claim <kit name>
           create <name of kit> (opens kit creation menu)
           delete <kit name> (deletes kit)
           edit <kit name> (opens kit editor gui)
           list (lists all kits)
           reload (saves kits)
           view (lets you view all kits)

- **/respawnall** (respawns all players who are in spectator from spectator on death setting)

Compatibility: Paper 1.21.x
Spigot/Bukkit not officially supported
